subcodes.first_line: O servant who preceded Karim! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the All-Merciful. Verily, from the direction of His luminous sanctuary doth He call thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد قبل کریم ان استمع ندآء ربک الرحیم انه من شطر منظره المنیر ینادیک و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement
